title: Stop the Children
description: On pages 1–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #9, G-5 Marines. The central beat is stop the children.
scene: The scene focuses on stop the children, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #9, G-5 Marines shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So don't you lay a hand

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hurry!! Those without injuries, keep moving!!

summary: Stop the Children. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
